title: MTR Renfe Addon
description: Esto es un addon de MTR con decoraciones de RENFE. This is an MTR addon with RENFE decorations.
body:
# MTR Renfe Addon 🚉

30,000+ downloads
Thanks for all the support and motivation to keep working on this addon ❤️

## Important
All trademarks and logos shown in this pack are owned by their respective companies.
This is an independent project with no affiliation, endorsement, or claim of ownership.

THIS ADDON HAS ITS OWN DISCORD SERVER: [**MTR RENFE ADDON**](https://discord.gg/4auUMwfyW7)

## Español

### Bienvenido al portal de MTR Renfe Addon 🚉

¡Gracias por visitar! Este complemento ha sido creado especialmente para enriquecer la experiencia ferroviaria en [**MTR (Minecraft Transit Railway)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) con decoraciones inspiradas en **RENFE** y otros elementos relacionados con el ferrocarril español.

Con este addon, puedes añadir elementos como señalización ferroviaria de RENFE y mobiliario específico del sistema ferroviario español, aportando un toque más auténtico y reconocible.

---

### MTR RENFE Extension (Paquete de recursos)

Además, existe un **paquete de recursos opcional** llamado [**MTR RENFE Extension**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-renfe-extension), diseñado para **extender visualmente** el MTR Renfe Addon y mejorar la inmersión.

Este paquete se centra principalmente en:
- **Trenes y repintados de RENFE**
- Pequeños recursos visuales adicionales que complementan el addon

El paquete de recursos **no es obligatorio**, pero se recomienda si deseas una experiencia más completa y coherente con el contenido de RENFE.


---

## English

### Welcome to the MTR Renfe Addon portal 🚉

Thank you for visiting! This add-on has been created to enrich the railway experience in  
[**MTR (Minecraft Transit Railway)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) with decorations inspired by **RENFE** and other elements related to the Spanish railway system.

With this add-on, you can add RENFE railway signage and furniture specific to the Spanish railway system, providing a more authentic and recognizable atmosphere.

---

### MTR RENFE Extension (Resource Pack)

In addition, there is an **optional resource pack** called [**MTR RENFE Extension**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-renfe-extension), designed to **visually extend** the MTR Renfe Addon and improve immersion.

This resource pack mainly focuses on:
- **RENFE trains and repaints**
- Small additional visual resources that complement the add-on

The resource pack is **not required**, but it is recommended if you want a more complete and immersive RENFE-themed experience.
